info.name: Microsoft Azure StorageImportExport
info.description: The Storage Import/Export Resource Provider API.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Importexport Locations Locationname

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the location. For example, West US or westus.

request.description: Returns the details about a location to which you can ship the disks associated with an import or export job. A location is an Azure region.

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Importexport Locations

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

request.description: Returns a list of locations to which you can ship the disks associated with an import or export job. A location is a Microsoft data center region.

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Importexport Jobs

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.

query.description: An integer value that specifies how many jobs at most should be returned. The value cannot exceed 100.
Can be used to restrict the results to certain conditions.
(Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription ID for the Azure user.

request.description: Returns all active and completed jobs in a subscription.

response.name: OK

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Importexport Jobs Jobname

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.

query.description: (Required) Specifies the API version to use for this request.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription ID for the Azure user.
(Required) The resource group name uniquely identifies the resource group within the user subscription.
(Required) The name of the import/export job.

request.description: Updates specific properties of a job. You can call this operation to notify the Import/Export service that the hard drives comprising the import or export job have been shipped to the Microsoft data center. It can also be used to cancel an existing job.

response.name: OK

header.description: Specifies the preferred language for the response.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The subscription ID for the Azure user.
(Required) The resource group name uniquely identifies the resource group within the user subscription.
(Required) The name of the import/export job.

request.description: Deletes an existing job. Only jobs in the Creating or Completed states can be deleted.

query.description: An integer value that specifies how many jobs at most should be returned. The value cannot exceed 100.

variable.description: (Required) The subscription ID for the Azure user.
